query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as total, 
  COUNT(DISTINCT research_field_name) as unique_fields
FROM university_field_images 
WHERE university_name = 'University of Washington';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2w6DdBww2bzwyZZ.root --database hB2F5YxeXakQRcL5WU36Vw --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total, 
  COUNT(DISTINCT research_field_name) as unique_fields
FROM university_field_images 
WHERE university_name = 'University of Washington';
